# Hash-pinned import-deps for the ClusterFuzzLite fuzz build (satisfies OSSF
# Scorecard Pinned-Dependencies — pipCommand pinned by hash). Only what app.models
# needs at import; NOT the full project (build.sh deliberately avoids `pip install .`
# because pyproject pins requires-python>=3.14 while the base image ships 3.11).
# Regenerate: uv pip compile <(printf 'sqlmodel\nsqlalchemy\npydantic\n') \
#   --generate-hashes --python-version 3.11 --no-header -o .clusterfuzzlite/requirements.txt
# Dependabot (pip ecosystem, /.clusterfuzzlite) keeps these fresh.
annotated-types==0.7.0 \
    --hash=sha256:1f02e8b43a8fbbc3f3e0d4f0f4bfc8131bcb4eebe8849b8e5c773f3a1c582a53 \
    --hash=sha256:aff07c09a53a08bc8cfccb9c85b05f1aa9a2a6f23728d790723543408344ce89
    # via pydantic
